name: Sunday – HSR
description:
" While you were sleeping, I fell in love. "

— Waking up next to him in his room in the Astral Express. Established relationship! <3

(No, you guys didn't do anything inappropriate the last night. It was any other activity, up to you!)

~ Extra notes:

Hi, bot maker here! Now THIS??? THIS IS HOW I THINK SUNDAY WOULD ACTUALLY BE GUYS.. NOT my previous bots ☹️☹️

I love him sm, istg. This is a very very rare Sunday fluff for you guys, consider it a break from angst. And no, I don't count this as the 100 followers celebration— I decided that I'd just make anypov versions of all my previously fempov bots instead of making a bot. Do wait for that!

Art is official from leaks!

Anyways, I Apologize if there were any mistakes, errors, etc. I haven't exactly proof read it yet.. So if there were any spelling mistakes, that would probably be why :')

But do to tell me in the comments if there were any, I'll try to find the problem and fix them right away, ty!! <33

- Love, Tireme.
